patternsAdopted.implementation: Bouncy overshoot animations on all interactive elements using cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1). Coin-drop interaction for ideas. Vinyl spin on project hover.
Pastel-colored badge pills on dashboard stat cards (badge-mint, badge-pink, badge-turquoise). Stamp badges on idea postcards. Status labels on project records.
Mini velocity gauges with animated gradient fills. Milestone strip showing version progress. Star ratings on kanban tickets.
Project record cards with hover lift + rotation animation. Postcard cards with corner fold and hover float. Order ticket cards with slight rotate on hover.
Cherry pink (#ff6b8a) as dominant accent with turquoise (#4ecdc4) secondary. Neon text shadows on kanban column headers. Gold highlights on schema channel titles.
viewSlideIn keyframe animation with translateX and scale for entering views. Each view slides in from the right with a bounce overshoot.

Every view has a unique retro metaphor: speedometer dashboard, vinyl records for projects, drive-in menu for kanban, TV screens for schema, jukebox listing for files, postcards for ideas, comic strips for chat, control panel for settings. No two views share the same visual language.
Neon marquee header sets the diner narrative. Filing cabinet sidebar tells the workspace story. Coin-drop interaction creates a jukebox ritual. Highway breadcrumbs add journey metaphor.

Chrome gradients on bezels and toggles simulate brushed metal. Checkerboard patterns via repeating-conic-gradient. Graph paper grid on whiteboard. Leather-toned filing cabinet. CRT screen effect on schema entities.

uniqueDifferentiators: 10 distinct view metaphors (no two views look alike)
Jukebox bottom navigation with flip animation
Chrome bezel system using CSS gradients (no images)
Neon sign header with per-letter flicker animation
TV-shaped schema entities with antennas and dials
Filing cabinet sidebar with physical drawer aesthetics
Order ticket kanban cards with perforated edge
Comic strip speech bubbles for AI chat
Physical chrome toggle switches in settings
